title: heliophila pubescens
intro: Heliophila pubescens, also known as the hairy heliophila, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of heliophila pubescens include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of heliophila pubescens are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the plant's medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
